name: Quickness
description: Increases movement speed by 50% and attack speed by 50%.

name: Alacrity
description: Increases boon and condition duration by 50%.

name: Might
description: Increases power and condition damage by 30 per stack.

name: Fury
description: Increases critical-hit chance by 50%.

name: Protection
description: Reduces incoming damage by 33%.

name: Regeneration
description: Heals 520 health per second.

name: Stability
description: Prevents movement-impairing effects from being applied.

name: Swiftness
description: Increases movement speed by 33%.

name: Vigor
description: Increases endurance regeneration by 100%.

name: Resistance
description: Reduces condition damage received and condition duration by 100%.

name: Aegis
description: Blocks the next incoming attack.

name: Retaliation
description: Reflects incoming attacks back at the attacker.

name: Burning
description: Deals damage every second and reduces healing effectiveness by 33%.

name: Bleeding
description: Deals damage based on a percentage of the target's max health.

name: Poison
description: Deals damage every second and reduces healing effectiveness by 33%.

name: Torment
description: Deals damage every third hit.

name: Confusion
description: Deals damage when the target uses a skill.

name: Crippled
description: Movement speed reduced by 50% and increased fall damage.

name: Chilled
description: Movement speed reduced by 66% and skills recharge 66% slower.

name: Immobile
description: Movement speed reduced to 0.

name: Weakness
description: Endurance is reduced by 100% and skills recharge 50% slower.

name: Vulnerability
description: Receives 1% more damage per stack.

name: Fireball
description: Fire spell that deals 159 damage.

name: Whirlwind
description: Spinning melee attack that hits multiple foes.

name: Rapid Fire
description: Fires a volley of arrows at the target.

name: Frost Fan
description: Throws ice projectiles at nearby foes.

name: Earthshaker
description: A powerful ground slam that damages and dazes foes.

name: Healing Spring
description: Summons a healing spring that pulses healing and removes a condition from allies.

name: Well of Blood
description: Creates a well that pulses healing to allies standing in it.

name: Signet of Courage
description: Passive: grants aegis to nearby allies when struck. Active: removes conditions.

name: Symbol of Swiftness
description: Place a symbol that grants swiftness to allies.

name: Sanctuary
description: Create a dome that blocks projectiles.

name: Save Yourselves
description: Shout. Grant aegis and resolution to nearby allies.

name: Litany of Wrath
description: Shout. Grant fury and remove conditions from allies.

name: Bane Signet
description: Signet. Active: strip boons from target.

name: Sword of Justice
description: Smite enemies with a magical sword.

name: Zealot's Embrace
description: Fire a piercing beam that pulls enemies toward you.

name: Whirling Wrath
description: Spin in a circle, damaging nearby enemies.

name: Puncture Shot
description: Fire a piercing arrow that cripples foes.

name: Healing Breeze
description: Create a healing ward that pulses regeneration.

name: Light Spear
description: Dragonhunter elite. Fire a piercing spear that pulls enemies to you.

name: Renewed Focus
description: Convert all your energy to Virtues and reset their recharge.

name: Rallying Blade
description: Throw a banner at the target location that pulses regeneration.

name: Frenzy
description: Gain adrenaline and strike multiple nearby foes.

name: Cleave
description: A wide arcing slash that hits multiple foes.

name: Sever Artery
description: Slash your foe, inflicting bleeding.

name: Call to Arms
description: Shout. Drop a banner that grants regeneration and stability.

name: Rally!
description: Shout. Revive fallen allies with health and vigor.

name: Endure Pain
description: Stance. Gain damage reduction for a short time.

name: Balanced Stance
description: Stance. Gain stability and resistance to stun.

name: Defiant Stance
description: Stance. Break free from stuns and gain stability.

name: For Great Justice
description: Shout. Grant might to nearby allies.

name: Healing Signet
description: Signet. Active: heal yourself and remove a condition.

name: Berserk
description: Berserker elite. Enter berserk mode gaining adrenaline per second.

name: Head Butt
description: Spellbreaker elite. Stun your target.

name: Healing Turret
description: Deploy a turret that heals allies.

name: Elite Mortar Kit
description: Equip a mortar kit that deals long-range area damage.

name: Elite Supply Drop
description: Call in an aerial supply drop of turrets and utilities.

name: Throw Mine
description: Throw a proximity mine that damages and cripples foes.

name: Slick Shoes
description: Spray oil under your feet to gain swiftness and break root.

name: Flash Shell
description: Fire a flash shell that blinds nearby foes.

name: Booby Trap
description: Place a trap that explodes when stepped on.

name: Acid Bomb
description: Hurl an acid bomb that removes boons and applies vulnerability.

name: Bomb Kit
description: Equip bombs as your weapon.

name: Grenade Kit
description: Equip grenades as your weapon.

name: Tool Kit
description: Equip maintenance tools for close-range combat.

name: Fire Bomb
description: Throw a bomb that causes burning.

name: Healing Spring
description: Healing ability that pulses regeneration.

name: One Wolf Pack
description: Call wolves to attack your foes.

name: Sic 'Em!
description: Shout. Send your pet to attack target.

name: Protect Me!
description: Shout. Grant protection to your pet.

name: Guard!
description: Shout. Gain retaliation and your pet is granted regeneration.

name: Quickening Zephyr
description: Soulbeast elite. Grant superspeed to nearby allies.

name: Unnatural Predation
description: Untamed elite. Grant swiftness and fury to allies.

name: Crossfire
description: Fire arrows at multiple targets in quick succession.

name: Hunter's Call
description: Grant might to nearby allies.

name: Wing Strike
description: Knockback your target.

name: Hide in Shadows
description: Stealth yourself and heal.

name: Dagger Storm
description: Daredevil elite. Spin daggers around you.

name: Basilisk Venom
description: Create a venom that dazes foes.

name: Crippling Poison
description: Create a venom that cripples foes.

name: Shadow Refuge
description: Create a field that stealths allies.

name: Signet of Shadows
description: Signet. Active: steal boons and gain stealth.

name: Withdraw
description: Shadowstep to your target and gain vigor.

name: Heartseeker
description: Shadowstep to your target dealing damage.

name: Backstab
description: Deal damage from behind.

name: Cluster Bomb
description: Throw bombs that scatter.

name: Conjure Lightning Hammer
description: Conjure a hammer that strikes nearby foes with electricity.

name: Tornado
description: Create a tornado that picks up enemies.

name: Glyph of Elemental Harmony
description: Glyph. Activate all attunements at once.

name: Lightning Flash
description: Teleport to your target.

name: Magnetic Shield
description: Projectile finisher. Pulls projectiles to you and blocks them.

name: Comet
description: Drop a meteor on the target location.

name: Boil
description: Create a boiling field that damages and chills foes.

name: Frozen Ground
description: Drop an ice field that chills enemies.

name: Healing Mantra
description: Mantra. Heal yourself and nearby allies.

name: Time Warp
description: Chronomancer elite. Create a time-slowing bubble.

name: Mantra of Concentration
description: Mantra. Remove stun and grant stability.

name: Mantra of Resolve
description: Mantra. Remove conditions.

name: Feedback
description: Reflect projectiles back at attackers.

name: Distortion
description: Briefly become invulnerable.

name: Blink
description: Teleport a short distance.

name: Mind Slash
description: Cast a beam of psychic energy.

name: Mind Spike
description: Fire a heavy psychic projectile.

name: Mirror Image
description: Create clones of yourself that distract enemies.

name: Phantasmal Warlord
description: Summon a phantasmal warrior.

name: Consume Conditions
description: Remove conditions from yourself and gain health.

name: Plaguelands
description: Scourge elite. Create a field of plague conditions.

name: Spectral Walk
description: Shadowstep to your target and leave a spectral path.

name: Corrosive Poison Cloud
description: Create a cloud that applies poison.

name: Well of Suffering
description: Place a well that pulses torment.

name: Well of Darkness
description: Place a well that pulses blind.

name: Fear
description: Infuse fear, causing nearby foes to flee.

name: Life Blast
description: Fire a blast of necrotic energy.

name: Deathly Swarm
description: Fire piercing locust swarm.

name: Reaper of Souls
description: Reaper elite. Summon the Reaper.

name: Inspiring Reinforcement
description: Legendary stance. Heal allies.

name: Rite of the Great Dove
description: Legendary heal that cleanses and provides resistance.

name: Vengeful Hammers
description: Summon two hammers that strike nearby foes.

name: Impossible Odds
description: Gain fury and quickness; dealing damage to nearby foes.

name: Legendary Renegade Stance
description: Switch to the Renegade legend (assassin specialization).

name: Legendary Demon Stance
description: Switch to the Demon legend (defense specialization).

name: Demon's Triangle
description: Create a burning triangle that pulses damage.

name: Energy Threshold
description: Project a beam and apply vulnerability.

name: Shield of the Avenger
description: Project a shield.
